platform_type GROUND_DESIGNATOR WSF_PLATFORM

platform_type FIGHTER_AIRCRAFT WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 250 m/sec
      minimum_speed 150 m/sec

      weapon lg_bomb

end_platform
